src: Supports running OpenWrt on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.
ja: Amlogic、Allwinner、RockchipデバイスでのOpenWrt動作をサポート。a311d、s922x、s905x3、s905x2、s912、s905d、s905x、s905w、s905、s905l、rk3588、rk3568、rk3399、rk3328、h6などに対応。
